# Let's open the provided file and print it with indices to understand exact content.
path = "/mnt/data/file-Wnok7jAWzwN6SCV86FyGN7-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:5000]

text = open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
# Find all aya_start/aya_end pairs
import re
spans = []
for m in re.finditer(r'\(aya_start\)', text):
    start_marker_end = m.end()
    end_m = re.search(r'\(aya_end\)', text[start_marker_end:])
    if end_m:
        aya_start_idx = start_marker_end
        aya_end_idx = start_marker_end + end_m.start()
        # Trim leading/trailing whitespace if any
        # But there shouldn't be spaces
        # adjust for whitespace trimming
        while aya_start_idx < aya_end_idx and text[aya_start_idx].isspace():
            aya_start_idx += 1
        while aya_end_idx > aya_start_idx and text[aya_end_idx-1].isspace():
            aya_end_idx -= 1
        spans.append((aya_start_idx, aya_end_idx, 'Aya', text[aya_start_idx:aya_end_idx]))
len(spans), spans[:2]

# Find all occurrences of the substring without quotes
hadith_phrase = "إنما بعثت معلما"
positions = []
start = 0
while True:
    idx = text.find(hadith_phrase, start)
    if idx == -1:
        break
    positions.append(idx)
    start = idx + 1
positions, len(positions)

refs = []
phrases = [
"وَقالَ الَّذِي آمَنَ",
"يا أَبَتِ إِنِّي رَأَيْتُ أَحَدَ عَشَرَ كَوْكَباً",
"وَيَجْعَلُونَ لِلَّهِ الْبَناتِ سُبْحانَهُ وَلَهُمْ ما يَشْتَهُونَ",
"فَلا أُقْسِمُ بِمَواقِعِ النُّجُومِ* وَإِنَّهُ لَقَسَمٌ لَوْ تَعْلَمُونَ عَظِيمٌ",
"يا قَوْمِ إِنَّما هذِهِ الْحَياةُ الدُّنْيا مَتاعٌ وَإِنَّ الْآخِرَةَ هِيَ دارُ الْقَرارِ",
"وَإِنَّهُ لَقَسَمٌ لَوْ تَعْلَمُونَ عَظِيمٌ"
]
for ph in phrases:
    idx = text.find(ph)
    refs.append((ph, idx))
refs

# Helper to extract a span from start at phrase until token " {surah_name}:" where surah name includes Arabic letters and colon.
def extract_until_surah_colon(text, start_idx):
    # find the next ' ' then word with colon; but to be robust find the next ':' and then backtrack to preceding space.
    colon_idx = text.find(":", start_idx)
    if colon_idx == -1:
        return None
    # The surah name likely ends just before colon, but avoid catching earlier colons before the surah if any star? 
    # In this references block, the first colon after ayah text might be the surah colon.
    # We'll assume so.
    # Now backtrack from colon index to find the previous space separating word from ayah text
    # The ayah text ends just before the space preceding the surah name. That space index is one char before the surah's first character.
    # Find the previous space between start_idx and colon_idx
    prev_space = text.rfind(" ", start_idx, colon_idx)
    # Some pieces may have no space if colon attached? But likely there is a space. If not, we might use newline or punctuation.
    if prev_space == -1:
        prev_space = colon_idx
    end_idx = prev_space
    # Trim trailing punctuation spaces
    while end_idx > start_idx and text[end_idx-1].isspace():
        end_idx -= 1
    return (start_idx, end_idx)

ref_spans = []
# First block after "كقوله تعالى: "
start1 = text.find("وَقالَ الَّذِي آمَنَ", 0)
ref_spans.append(extract_until_surah_colon(text, start1))

# Second: "يا أَبَتِ ..."
start2 = text.find("يا أَبَتِ إِنِّي رَأَيْتُ", 0)
ref_spans.append(extract_until_surah_colon(text, start2))

# Third: "وَيَجْعَلُونَ ..."
start3 = text.find("وَيَجْعَلُونَ لِلَّهِ الْبَناتِ", 0)
ref_spans.append(extract_until_surah_colon(text, start3))

# Fourth: "فَلا أُقْسِمُ ..."
start4 = text.find("فَلا أُقْسِمُ بِمَواقِعِ النُّجُومِ", 0)
ref_spans.append(extract_until_surah_colon(text, start4))

ref_spans

for s, e in ref_spans:
    print((s, e, text[s:e]))

# Show context around each hadith position
positions = [458, 852, 1131, 1507]
for idx in positions:
    print(text[idx-5:idx] + "[" + text[idx:idx+len("إنما بعثت معلما")] + "]" + text[idx+len("إنما بعثت معلما"):idx+len("إنما بعثت معلما")+5])

citations = []
# Add ayah spans from markers
for s,e,typ,txt in spans:
    citations.append({"span_start": s, "span_end": e, "span_text": txt, "citation_type": "Aya"})
# Add hadith spans
for idx in positions:
    citations.append({"span_start": idx, "span_end": idx+len("إنما بعثت معلما"), 
                      "span_text": "إنما بعثت معلما", "citation_type": "Hadith"})
# Add references ayah spans
for s, e in ref_spans:
    citations.append({"span_start": s, "span_end": e, "span_text": text[s:e], "citation_type": "Aya"})
# Sort
citations = sorted(citations, key=lambda x: x["span_start"])
len(citations), citations[:3], citations[-3:]

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":278,"span_end":396,"span_text":"وَقُلْ إِنِّي نَذِرٌ لِّرَبِّي وَلَا أَقُولُ لِلَّذِينَ تَجْهَرُ بِالْعَمَلِ السَّيِّئَاتِ مَا تَفْعَلُونَ مِنْ شَيْءٍ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":458,"span_end":473,"span_text":"إنما بعثت معلما","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":627,"span_end":791,"span_text":"وَلَقَدْ نَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ يَضِيقُ صَدْرُكَ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ * فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَكُن مِّنَ السَّاجِدِينَ * وَاعْبُدْ رَبَّكَ حَتَّىٰ يَأْتِيَكَ الْيَقِينُ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":852,"span_end":867,"span_text":"إنما بعثت معلما","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1017,"span_end":1070,"span_text":"وَذَكِّرْ فَإِنَّ الذِّكْرَىٰ تَنْفَعُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":1131,"span_end":1146,"span_text":"إنما بعثت معلما","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1298,"span_end":1450,"span_text":"وَلَا تَسْتَوِي الْحَسَنَةُ وَلَا السَّيِّئَةُ ۚ ادْفَعْ بِالَّتِي هِيَ أَحْسَنُ فَإِذَا الَّذِي بَيْنَكَ وَبَيْنَهُ عَدَاوَةٌ كَأَنَّهُ وَلِيٌّ حَمِيمٌ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":1507,"span_end":1522,"span_text":"إنما بعثت معلما","citation_type":"Hadeeth"},{"span_start":1763,"span_end":1925,"span_text":"وَقالَ الَّذِي آمَنَ يا قَوْمِ اتَّبِعُونِ أَهْدِكُمْ سَبِيلَ الرَّشادِ* يا قَوْمِ إِنَّما هذِهِ الْحَياةُ الدُّنْيا مَتاعٌ وَإِنَّ الْآخِرَةَ هِيَ دارُ الْقَرارِ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":1998,"span_end":2098,"span_text":"يا أَبَتِ إِنِّي رَأَيْتُ أَحَدَ عَشَرَ كَوْكَباً وَالشَّمْسَ وَالْقَمَرَ رَأَيْتُهُمْ لِي ساجِدِينَ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":2314,"span_end":2380,"span_text":"وَيَجْعَلُونَ لِلَّهِ الْبَناتِ سُبْحانَهُ وَلَهُمْ ما يَشْتَهُونَ","citation_type":"Aya"},{"span_start":2420,"span_end":2500,"span_text":"فَلا أُقْسِمُ بِمَواقِعِ النُّجُومِ* وَإِنَّهُ لَقَسَمٌ لَوْ تَعْلَمُونَ عَظِيمٌ","citation_type":"Aya"}]}
